name: FATHIYA Core Owned Surface

in_scope.notes: Document the asset in the Target Card and Scope Map. No active testing is allowed.
Preparation-only coverage for the deployed ops console while formal policy is pending.
Repository can be listed in scope artifacts, but no credential access or destructive repository actions are authorized.
Repository remains in preparation-only mode until formal written policy publication.

out_of_scope: Any live external testing, exploitation, or vulnerability validation against these assets before policy publication.
Scanning, automated probing, or rate-driven enumeration of live systems.
Credential access, secrets retrieval, private data access, or account interaction.
Destructive actions, persistence changes, or availability-impacting behavior.
Any third-party asset, dependency, or service interaction without explicit written policy.
unknown_scope: Formal written policy URL and safe-harbor language.
Explicit allowed testing methods, exclusions, and rate limits.
Reporting contact, escalation path, and SLA for findings.
Any hosted third-party boundaries attached to the listed assets.
requires_clarification: Publish formal written policy before any active testing or external action.
Confirm which subdomains, environments, and supporting services are first-party owned.
Document rate limits, excluded areas, and reporting channel in a public or otherwise shared policy artifact.
boundary_note: PB005 preparation only. The existence of this Scope Map does not authorize testing. It records owned/project-declared assets and the explicit no-testing boundary until policy is formalized.
